verses.latin_vulgate: Væ pastoribus qui disperdunt et dilacerant  gregem pascuæ meæ ! dicit Dominus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ה֣וֹי רֹעִ֗ים מְאַבְּדִ֧ים וּמְפִצִ֛ים אֶת־צֹ֥אן מַרְעִיתִ֖י נְאֻם־יְהֹוָֽה׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: Woe be unto the pastors that destroy and scatter the sheep of my pasture! saith the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ideo hæc dicit Dominus Deus Israël  ad pastores qui pascunt populum meum :  Vos dispersistis gregem meum,  et ejecistis eos, et non visitastis eos :  ecce ego visitabo super vos  malitiam studiorum vestrorum, ait Dominus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לָ֠כֵ֠ן כֹּה־אָמַ֨ר יְהֹוָ֜ה אֱלֹהֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֗ל עַֽל־הָרֹעִים֮ הָרֹעִ֣ים אֶת־עַמִּי֒ אַתֶּ֞ם הֲפִצֹתֶ֤ם אֶת־צֹאנִי֙ וַתַּדִּח֔וּם וְלֹ֥א פְקַדְתֶּ֖ם אֹתָ֑ם הִנְנִ֨י פֹקֵ֧ד עֲלֵיכֶ֛ם אֶת־רֹ֥עַ מַעַלְלֵיכֶ֖ם נְאֻם־יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.king_james: Therefore thus saith the Lord God of Israel against the pastors that feed my people; Ye have scattered my flock, and driven them away, and have not visited them: behold, I will visit upon you the evil of your doings, saith the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ego congregabo reliquias gregis mei  de omnibus terris ad quas ejecero eos illuc :  et convertam eos ad rura sua,  et crescent et multiplicabuntur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַאֲנִ֗י אֲקַבֵּץ֙ אֶת־שְׁאֵרִ֣ית צֹאנִ֔י מִכֹּל֙ הָאֲרָצ֔וֹת אֲשֶׁר־הִדַּ֥חְתִּי אֹתָ֖ם שָׁ֑ם וַהֲשִׁבֹתִ֥י אֶתְהֶ֛ן עַל־נְוֵהֶ֖ן וּפָר֥וּ וְרָבֽוּ׃
verses.king_james: And I will gather the remnant of my flock out of all countries whither I have driven them, and will bring them again to their folds; and they shall be fruitful and increase.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et suscitabo super eos pastores, et pascent eos :  non formidabunt ultra, et non pavebunt,  et nullus quæretur ex numero, dicit Dominus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַהֲקִמֹתִ֧י עֲלֵיהֶ֛ם רֹעִ֖ים וְרָע֑וּם וְלֹא־יִֽירְא֨וּ ע֧וֹד וְלֹא־יֵחַ֛תּוּ וְלֹ֥א יִפָּקֵ֖דוּ נְאֻם־יְהֹוָֽה׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: And I will set up shepherds over them which shall feed them: and they shall fear no more, nor be dismayed, neither shall they be lacking, saith the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ecce dies veniunt, dicit Dominus,  et suscitabo David germen justum :  et regnabit rex, et sapiens erit,  et faciet judicium et justitiam in terra.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הִנֵּ֨ה יָמִ֤ים בָּאִים֙ נְאֻם־יְהֹוָ֔ה וַהֲקִמֹתִ֥י לְדָוִ֖ד צֶ֣מַח צַדִּ֑יק וּמָ֤לַךְ מֶ֙לֶךְ֙ וְהִשְׂכִּ֔יל וְעָשָׂ֛ה מִשְׁפָּ֥ט וּצְדָקָ֖ה בָּאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.king_james: Behold, the days come, saith the Lord, that I will raise unto David a righteous Branch, and a King shall reign and prosper, and shall execute judgment and justice in the earth.

verses.latin_vulgate: In diebus illis salvabitur Juda,  et Israël habitabit confidenter :  et hoc est nomen quod vocabunt eum :  Dominus justus noster.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּיָמָיו֙ תִּוָּשַׁ֣ע יְהוּדָ֔ה וְיִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל יִשְׁכֹּ֣ן לָבֶ֑טַח וְזֶה־שְּׁמ֥וֹ אֲֽשֶׁר־יִקְרְא֖וֹ יְהֹוָ֥ה ׀ צִדְקֵֽנוּ׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: In his days Judah shall be saved, and Israel shall dwell safely: and this is his name whereby he shall be called, THE LORD OUR RIGHTEOUSNESS.

verses.latin_vulgate: Propter hoc ecce dies veniunt, dicit Dominus,  et non dicent ultra : Vivit Dominus,  qui eduxit filios Israël de terra Ægypti,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לָכֵ֛ן הִנֵּה־יָמִ֥ים בָּאִ֖ים נְאֻם־יְהֹוָ֑ה וְלֹא־יֹ֤אמְרוּ עוֹד֙ חַי־יְהֹוָ֔ה אֲשֶׁ֧ר הֶעֱלָ֛ה אֶת־בְּנֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל מֵאֶ֥רֶץ מִצְרָֽיִם׃
verses.king_james: Therefore, behold, the days come, saith the Lord, that they shall no more say, The Lord liveth, which brought up the children of Israel out of the land of Egypt;

verses.latin_vulgate: sed : Vivit Dominus,  qui eduxit et adduxit semen domus Israël de terra aquilonis,  et de cunctis terris ad quas ejeceram eos illuc,  et habitabunt in terra sua.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֣י אִם־חַי־יְהֹוָ֗ה אֲשֶׁ֣ר הֶעֱלָה֩ וַאֲשֶׁ֨ר הֵבִ֜יא אֶת־זֶ֨רַע בֵּ֤ית יִשְׂרָאֵל֙ מֵאֶ֣רֶץ צָפ֔וֹנָה וּמִכֹּל֙ הָאֲרָצ֔וֹת אֲשֶׁ֥ר הִדַּחְתִּ֖ים שָׁ֑ם וְיָשְׁב֖וּ עַל־אַדְמָתָֽם׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: But, The Lord liveth, which brought up and which led the seed of the house of Israel out of the north country, and from all countries whither I had driven them; and they shall dwell in their own land.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ad prophetas :   Contritum est cor meum in medio mei ;  contremuerunt omnia ossa mea :  factus sum quasi vir ebrius,  et quasi homo madidus a vino,  a facie Domini,  et a facie verborum sanctorum ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לַנְּבִאִ֞ים נִשְׁבַּ֧ר לִבִּ֣י בְקִרְבִּ֗י רָֽחֲפוּ֙ כׇּל־עַצְמוֹתַ֔י הָיִ֙יתִי֙ כְּאִ֣ישׁ שִׁכּ֔וֹר וּכְגֶ֖בֶר עֲבָ֣רוֹ יָ֑יִן מִפְּנֵ֣י יְהֹוָ֔ה וּמִפְּנֵ֖י דִּבְרֵ֥י קׇדְשֽׁוֹ׃
verses.king_james: Mine heart within me is broken because of the prophets; all my bones shake; I am like a drunken man, and like a man whom wine hath overcome, because of the Lord, and because of the words of his holiness.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quia adulteris repleta est terra,  quia a facie maledictionis luxit terra,  arefacta sunt arva deserti :  factus est cursus eorum malus,  et fortitudo eorum dissimilis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֤י מְנָֽאֲפִים֙ מָלְאָ֣ה הָאָ֔רֶץ כִּֽי־מִפְּנֵ֤י אָלָה֙ אָבְלָ֣ה הָאָ֔רֶץ יָבְשׁ֖וּ נְא֣וֹת מִדְבָּ֑ר וַתְּהִ֤י מְרֽוּצָתָם֙ רָעָ֔ה וּגְבוּרָתָ֖ם לֹא־כֵֽן׃
verses.king_james: For the land is full of adulterers; for because of swearing the land mourneth; the pleasant places of the wilderness are dried up, and their course is evil, and their force is not right.

verses.latin_vulgate: Propheta namque et sacerdos polluti sunt,  et in domo mea inveni malum eorum, ait Dominus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־גַם־נָבִ֥יא גַם־כֹּהֵ֖ן חָנֵ֑פוּ גַּם־בְּבֵיתִ֛י מָצָ֥אתִי רָעָתָ֖ם נְאֻם־יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.king_james: For both prophet and priest are profane; yea, in my house have I found their wickedness, saith the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Idcirco via eorum erit quasi lubricum in tenebris :  impellentur enim, et corruent in ea :  afferam enim super eos mala,  annum visitationis eorum, ait Dominus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לָכֵן֩ יִהְיֶ֨ה דַרְכָּ֜ם לָהֶ֗ם כַּחֲלַקְלַקּוֹת֙ בָּאֲפֵלָ֔ה יִדַּ֖חוּ וְנָ֣פְלוּ בָ֑הּ כִּי־אָבִ֨יא עֲלֵיהֶ֥ם רָעָ֛ה שְׁנַ֥ת פְּקֻדָּתָ֖ם נְאֻם־יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.king_james: Wherefore their way shall be unto them as slippery ways in the darkness: they shall be driven on, and fall therein: for I will bring evil upon them, even the year of their visitation, saith the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et in prophetis Samariæ vidi fatuitatem :  prophetabant in Baal,  et decipiebant populum meum Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבִנְבִיאֵ֥י שֹׁמְר֖וֹן רָאִ֣יתִי תִפְלָ֑ה הִנַּבְּא֣וּ בַבַּ֔עַל וַיַּתְע֥וּ אֶת־עַמִּ֖י אֶת־יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.king_james: And I have seen folly in the prophets of Samaria; they prophesied in Baal, and caused my people Israel to err.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et in prophetis Jerusalem vidi similitudinem adulterantium,  et iter mendacii :  et confortaverunt manus pessimorum,  ut non converteretur unusquisque a malitia sua :  facti sunt mihi omnes ut Sodoma,  et habitatores ejus quasi Gomorrha.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבִנְבִאֵ֨י יְרוּשָׁלַ֜͏ִם רָאִ֣יתִי שַׁעֲרוּרָ֗ה נָא֞וֹף וְהָלֹ֤ךְ בַּשֶּׁ֙קֶר֙ וְחִזְּקוּ֙ יְדֵ֣י מְרֵעִ֔ים לְבִ֨לְתִּי־שָׁ֔בוּ אִ֖ישׁ מֵרָעָת֑וֹ הָיוּ־לִ֤י כֻלָּם֙ כִּסְדֹ֔ם וְיֹשְׁבֶ֖יהָ כַּעֲמֹרָֽה׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: I have seen also in the prophets of Jerusalem an horrible thing: they commit adultery, and walk in lies: they strengthen also the hands of evildoers, that none doth return from his wickedness: they are all of them unto me as Sodom, and the inhabitants thereof as Gomorrah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Propterea hæc dicit Dominus exercituum ad prophetas :  Ecce ego cibabo eos absinthio,  et potabo eos felle :  a prophetis enim Jerusalem egressa est pollutio  super omnem terram.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לָכֵ֞ן כֹּה־אָמַ֨ר יְהֹוָ֤ה צְבָאוֹת֙ עַל־הַנְּבִאִ֔ים הִנְנִ֨י מַאֲכִ֤יל אוֹתָם֙ לַעֲנָ֔ה וְהִשְׁקִתִ֖ים מֵי־רֹ֑אשׁ כִּ֗י מֵאֵת֙ נְבִיאֵ֣י יְרוּשָׁלַ֔͏ִם יָצְאָ֥ה חֲנֻפָּ֖ה לְכׇל־הָאָֽרֶץ׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: Therefore thus saith the Lord of hosts concerning the prophets; Behold, I will feed them with wormwood, and make them drink the water of gall: for from the prophets of Jerusalem is profaneness gone forth into all the land.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hæc dicit Dominus exercituum :  Nolite audire verba prophetarum  qui prophetant vobis, et decipiunt vos :  visionem cordis sui loquuntur,  non de ore Domini.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כֹּה־אָמַ֞ר יְהֹוָ֣ה צְבָא֗וֹת אַֽל־תִּשְׁמְע֞וּ עַל־דִּבְרֵ֤י הַנְּבִאִים֙ הַנִּבְּאִ֣ים לָכֶ֔ם מַהְבִּלִ֥ים הֵ֖מָּה אֶתְכֶ֑ם חֲז֤וֹן לִבָּם֙ יְדַבֵּ֔רוּ לֹ֖א מִפִּ֥י יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.king_james: Thus saith the Lord of hosts, Hearken not unto the words of the prophets that prophesy unto you: they make you vain: they speak a vision of their own heart, and not out of the mouth of the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dicunt his qui blasphemant me :  Locutus est Dominus : Pax erit vobis :  et omni qui ambulat in pravitate cordis sui dixerunt :  Non veniet super vos malum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֹמְרִ֤ים אָמוֹר֙ לִֽמְנַאֲצַ֔י דִּבֶּ֣ר יְהֹוָ֔ה שָׁל֖וֹם יִהְיֶ֣ה לָכֶ֑ם וְ֠כֹ֠ל הֹלֵ֞ךְ בִּשְׁרִר֤וּת לִבּוֹ֙ אָֽמְר֔וּ לֹא־תָב֥וֹא עֲלֵיכֶ֖ם רָעָֽה׃
verses.king_james: They say still unto them that despise me, The Lord hath said, Ye shall have peace; and they say unto every one that walketh after the imagination of his own heart, No evil shall come upon you.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quis enim affuit in consilio Domini,  et vidit, et audivit sermonem ejus ?  quis consideravit verbum illius, et audivit ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֣י מִ֤י עָמַד֙ בְּס֣וֹד יְהֹוָ֔ה וְיֵ֖רֶא וְיִשְׁמַ֣ע אֶת־דְּבָר֑וֹ מִי־הִקְשִׁ֥יב (דברי) [דְּבָר֖וֹ] וַיִּשְׁמָֽע׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: For who hath stood in the counsel of the Lord, and hath perceived and heard his word? who hath marked his word, and heard it?

verses.latin_vulgate: Ecce turbo Dominicæ indignationis egredietur,  et tempestas erumpens super caput impiorum veniet.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הִנֵּ֣ה ׀ סַעֲרַ֣ת יְהֹוָ֗ה חֵמָה֙ יָֽצְאָ֔ה וְסַ֖עַר מִתְחוֹלֵ֑ל עַ֛ל רֹ֥אשׁ רְשָׁעִ֖ים יָחֽוּל׃
verses.king_james: Behold, a whirlwind of the Lord is gone forth in fury, even a grievous whirlwind: it shall fall grievously upon the head of the wicked.

verses.latin_vulgate: Non revertetur furor Domini,  usque dum faciat et usque dum compleat cogitationem cordis sui :  in novissimis diebus intelligetis consilium ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לֹ֤א יָשׁוּב֙ אַף־יְהֹוָ֔ה עַד־עֲשֹׂת֥וֹ וְעַד־הֲקִימ֖וֹ מְזִמּ֣וֹת לִבּ֑וֹ בְּאַֽחֲרִית֙ הַיָּמִ֔ים תִּתְבּ֥וֹנְנוּ בָ֖הּ בִּינָֽה׃
verses.king_james: The anger of the Lord shall not return, until he have executed, and till he have performed the thoughts of his heart: in the latter days ye shall consider it perfectly.

verses.latin_vulgate: Non mittebam prophetas,  et ipsi currebant :  non loquebar ad eos,  et ipsi prophetabant.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לֹא־שָׁלַ֥חְתִּי אֶת־הַנְּבִאִ֖ים וְהֵ֣ם רָ֑צוּ לֹא־דִבַּ֥רְתִּי אֲלֵיהֶ֖ם וְהֵ֥ם נִבָּֽאוּ׃
verses.king_james: I have not sent these prophets, yet they ran: I have not spoken to them, yet they prophesied.

verses.latin_vulgate: Si stetissent in consilio meo,  et nota fecissent verba mea populo meo,  avertissem utique eos a via sua mala,  et a cogitationibus suis pessimis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאִם־עָמְד֖וּ בְּסוֹדִ֑י וְיַשְׁמִ֤עוּ דְבָרַי֙ אֶת־עַמִּ֔י וִֽישִׁבוּם֙ מִדַּרְכָּ֣ם הָרָ֔ע וּמֵרֹ֖עַ מַעַלְלֵיהֶֽם׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: But if they had stood in my counsel, and had caused my people to hear my words, then they should have turned them from their evil way, and from the evil of their doings.

verses.latin_vulgate: Putasne Deus e vicino ego sum, dicit Dominus,  et non Deus de longe ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַאֱלֹהֵ֧י מִקָּרֹ֛ב אָ֖נִי נְאֻם־יְהֹוָ֑ה וְלֹ֥א אֱלֹהֵ֖י מֵרָחֹֽק׃
verses.king_james: Am I a God at hand, saith the Lord, and not a God afar off?

verses.latin_vulgate: Si occultabitur vir in absconditis,  et ego non videbo eum ? dicit Dominus.  Numquid non cælum et terram ego impleo ? dicit Dominus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אִם־יִסָּתֵ֨ר אִ֧ישׁ בַּמִּסְתָּרִ֛ים וַאֲנִ֥י לֹֽא־אֶרְאֶ֖נּוּ נְאֻם־יְהֹוָ֑ה הֲל֨וֹא אֶת־הַשָּׁמַ֧יִם וְאֶת־הָאָ֛רֶץ אֲנִ֥י מָלֵ֖א נְאֻם־יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.king_james: Can any hide himself in secret places that I shall not see him? saith the Lord. Do not I fill heaven and earth? saith the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Audivi quæ dixerunt prophetæ  prophetantes in nomine meo mendacium,  atque dicentes : Somniavi, somniavi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שָׁמַ֗עְתִּי אֵ֤ת אֲשֶׁר־אָֽמְרוּ֙ הַנְּבִאִ֔ים הַֽנִּבְּאִ֥ים בִּשְׁמִ֛י שֶׁ֖קֶר לֵאמֹ֑ר חָלַ֖מְתִּי חָלָֽמְתִּי׃
verses.king_james: I have heard what the prophets said, that prophesy lies in my name, saying, I have dreamed, I have dreamed.

verses.latin_vulgate: Usquequo istud est in corde prophetarum vaticinantium mendacium,  et prophetantium seductiones cordis sui ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַד־מָתַ֗י הֲיֵ֛שׁ בְּלֵ֥ב הַנְּבִאִ֖ים נִבְּאֵ֣י הַשָּׁ֑קֶר וּנְבִיאֵ֖י תַּרְמִ֥ת לִבָּֽם׃
verses.king_james: How long shall this be in the heart of the prophets that prophesy lies? yea, they are prophets of the deceit of their own heart;

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui volunt facere ut obliviscatur populus meus nominis mei,  propter somnia eorum quæ narrat unusquisque ad proximum suum,  sicut obliti sunt patres eorum nominis mei propter Baal ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַחֹשְׁבִ֗ים לְהַשְׁכִּ֤יחַ אֶת־עַמִּי֙ שְׁמִ֔י בַּחֲל֣וֹמֹתָ֔ם אֲשֶׁ֥ר יְסַפְּר֖וּ אִ֣ישׁ לְרֵעֵ֑הוּ כַּאֲשֶׁ֨ר שָׁכְח֧וּ אֲבוֹתָ֛ם אֶת־שְׁמִ֖י בַּבָּֽעַל׃
verses.king_james: Which think to cause my people to forget my name by their dreams which they tell every man to his neighbour, as their fathers have forgotten my name for Baal.

verses.latin_vulgate: Propheta qui habet somnium,  narret somnium :  et qui habet sermonem meum,  loquatur sermonem meum vere.  Quid paleis ad triticum ? dicit Dominus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַנָּבִ֞יא אֲשֶׁר־אִתּ֤וֹ חֲלוֹם֙ יְסַפֵּ֣ר חֲל֔וֹם וַאֲשֶׁ֤ר דְּבָרִי֙ אִתּ֔וֹ יְדַבֵּ֥ר דְּבָרִ֖י אֱמֶ֑ת מַה־לַתֶּ֥בֶן אֶת־הַבָּ֖ר נְאֻם־יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.king_james: The prophet that hath a dream, let him tell a dream; and he that hath my word, let him speak my word faithfully. What is the chaff to the wheat? saith the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Numquid non verba mea sunt quasi ignis, dicit Dominus,  et quasi malleus conterens petram ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הֲל֨וֹא כֹ֧ה דְבָרִ֛י כָּאֵ֖שׁ נְאֻם־יְהֹוָ֑ה וּכְפַטִּ֖ישׁ יְפֹ֥צֵֽץ סָֽלַע׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: Is not my word like as a fire? saith the Lord; and like a hammer that breaketh the rock in pieces?

verses.latin_vulgate: Propterea ecce ego ad prophetas, ait Dominus,  qui furantur verba mea unusquisque a proximo suo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לָכֵ֛ן הִנְנִ֥י עַל־הַנְּבִאִ֖ים נְאֻם־יְהֹוָ֑ה מְגַנְּבֵ֣י דְבָרַ֔י אִ֖ישׁ מֵאֵ֥ת רֵעֵֽהוּ׃
verses.king_james: Therefore, behold, I am against the prophets, saith the Lord, that steal my words every one from his neighbour.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ecce ego ad prophetas, ait Dominus,  qui assumunt linguas suas, et aiunt : Dicit Dominus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הִנְנִ֥י עַל־הַנְּבִיאִ֖ם נְאֻם־יְהֹוָ֑ה הַלֹּקְחִ֣ים לְשׁוֹנָ֔ם וַֽיִּנְאֲמ֖וּ נְאֻֽם׃
verses.king_james: Behold, I am against the prophets, saith the Lord, that use their tongues, and say, He saith.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ecce ego ad prophetas somniantes mendacium, ait Dominus,  qui narraverunt ea, et seduxerunt populum meum  in mendacio suo et in miraculis suis,  cum ego non misissem eos, nec mandassem eis :  qui nihil profuerunt populo huic, dicit Dominus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הִ֠נְנִ֠י עַֽל־נִבְּאֵ֞י חֲלֹמ֥וֹת שֶׁ֙קֶר֙ נְאֻם־יְהֹוָ֔ה וַֽיְסַפְּרוּם֙ וַיַּתְע֣וּ אֶת־עַמִּ֔י בְּשִׁקְרֵיהֶ֖ם וּבְפַחֲזוּתָ֑ם וְאָנֹכִ֨י לֹֽא־שְׁלַחְתִּ֜ים וְלֹ֣א צִוִּיתִ֗ים וְהוֹעֵ֛יל לֹא־יוֹעִ֥ילוּ לָעָם־הַזֶּ֖ה נְאֻם־יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.king_james: Behold, I am against them that prophesy false dreams, saith the Lord, and do tell them, and cause my people to err by their lies, and by their lightness; yet I sent them not, nor commanded them: therefore they shall not profit this people at all, saith the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Si igitur interrogaverit te populus iste,  vel propheta, aut sacerdos, dicens :  Quod est onus Domini ?  dices ad eos : Vos estis onus :  projiciam quippe vos, dicit Dominus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְכִֽי־יִשְׁאָלְךָ֩ הָעָ֨ם הַזֶּ֜ה אֽוֹ־הַנָּבִ֤יא אֽוֹ־כֹהֵן֙ לֵאמֹ֔ר מַה־מַּשָּׂ֖א יְהֹוָ֑ה וְאָמַרְתָּ֤ אֲלֵיהֶם֙ אֶת־מַה־מַּשָּׂ֔א וְנָטַשְׁתִּ֥י אֶתְכֶ֖ם נְאֻם־יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.king_james: And when this people, or the prophet, or a priest, shall ask thee, saying, What is the burden of the Lord? thou shalt then say unto them, What burden? I will even forsake you, saith the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et propheta, et sacerdos, et populus  qui dicit : Onus Domini :  visitabo super virum illum et super domum ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהַנָּבִ֤יא וְהַכֹּהֵן֙ וְהָעָ֔ם אֲשֶׁ֥ר יֹאמַ֖ר מַשָּׂ֣א יְהֹוָ֑ה וּפָקַדְתִּ֛י עַל־הָאִ֥ישׁ הַה֖וּא וְעַל־בֵּיתֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: And as for the prophet, and the priest, and the people, that shall say, The burden of the Lord, I will even punish that man and his house.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hæc dicetis unusquisque ad proximum,  et ad fratrem suum :  Quid respondit Dominus ?  et quid locutus est Dominus ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כֹּ֥ה תֹאמְר֛וּ אִ֥ישׁ עַל־רֵעֵ֖הוּ וְאִ֣ישׁ אֶל־אָחִ֑יו מֶה־עָנָ֣ה יְהֹוָ֔ה וּמַה־דִּבֶּ֖ר יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.king_james: Thus shall ye say every one to his neighbour, and every one to his brother, What hath the Lord answered? and, What hath the Lord spoken?

verses.latin_vulgate: Et onus Domini ultra non memorabitur :  quia onus erit unicuique sermo suus,  et pervertistis verba Dei viventis,  Domini exercituum, Dei nostri.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמַשָּׂ֥א יְהֹוָ֖ה לֹ֣א תִזְכְּרוּ־ע֑וֹד כִּ֣י הַמַּשָּׂ֗א יִֽהְיֶה֙ לְאִ֣ישׁ דְּבָר֔וֹ וַהֲפַכְתֶּ֗ם אֶת־דִּבְרֵי֙ אֱלֹהִ֣ים חַיִּ֔ים יְהֹוָ֥ה צְבָא֖וֹת אֱלֹהֵֽינוּ׃
verses.king_james: And the burden of the Lord shall ye mention no more: for every man’s word shall be his burden; for ye have perverted the words of the living God, of the Lord of hosts our God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hæc dices ad prophetam :  Quid respondit tibi Dominus ?  et quid locutus est Dominus ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כֹּ֥ה תֹאמַ֖ר אֶל־הַנָּבִ֑יא מֶה־עָנָ֣ךְ יְהֹוָ֔ה וּמַה־דִּבֶּ֖ר יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.king_james: Thus shalt thou say to the prophet, What hath the Lord answered thee? and, What hath the Lord spoken?

verses.latin_vulgate: Si autem onus Domini dixeritis,  propter hoc hæc dicit Dominus :  Quia dixistis sermonem istum : Onus Domini,  et misi ad vos dicens : Nolite dicere : Onus Domini :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאִם־מַשָּׂ֣א יְהֹוָה֮ תֹּאמֵ֒רוּ֒ לָכֵ֗ן כֹּ֚ה אָמַ֣ר יְהֹוָ֔ה יַ֧עַן אֲמׇרְכֶ֛ם אֶת־הַדָּבָ֥ר הַזֶּ֖ה מַשָּׂ֣א יְהֹוָ֑ה וָאֶשְׁלַ֤ח אֲלֵיכֶם֙ לֵאמֹ֔ר לֹ֥א תֹאמְר֖וּ מַשָּׂ֥א יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.king_james: But since ye say, The burden of the Lord; therefore thus saith the Lord; Because ye say this word, The burden of the Lord, and I have sent unto you, saying, Ye shall not say, The burden of the Lord;

verses.latin_vulgate: propterea ecce ego tollam vos portans,  et derelinquam vos,  et civitatem quam dedi vobis et patribus vestris,  a facie mea :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לָכֵ֣ן הִנְנִ֔י וְנָשִׁ֥יתִי אֶתְכֶ֖ם נָשֹׁ֑א וְנָטַשְׁתִּ֣י אֶתְכֶ֗ם וְאֶת־הָעִיר֙ אֲשֶׁ֨ר נָתַ֧תִּי לָכֶ֛ם וְלַאֲבוֹתֵיכֶ֖ם מֵעַ֥ל פָּנָֽי׃
verses.king_james: Therefore, behold, I, even I, will utterly forget you, and I will forsake you, and the city that I gave you and your fathers, and cast you out of my presence:

verses.latin_vulgate: et dabo vos in opprobrium sempiternum,  et in ignominiam æternam,  quæ numquam oblivione delebitur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְנָתַתִּ֥י עֲלֵיכֶ֖ם חֶרְפַּ֣ת עוֹלָ֑ם וּכְלִמּ֣וּת עוֹלָ֔ם אֲשֶׁ֖ר לֹ֥א תִשָּׁכֵֽחַ׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: And I will bring an everlasting reproach upon you, and a perpetual shame, which shall not be forgotten.
